errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.googleEmailUnverified: Your Google account's email address is not verified. Verify it with Google and try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.success: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.error: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from your account settings.

notFound.description: The page you are trying to access does not exists or was removed

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Fill in your details to get started.
register.acceptTermsPrefix: I have read and agree to the
register.acceptTermsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

acceptTerms.title: Just one more step
acceptTerms.description: Before continuing, confirm that you've read and agree to our terms.
acceptTerms.updatedDescription: Review and accept the updated documents to keep using your account.
acceptTerms.missingToken: Invalid or expired link. Please try signing in again.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.description: We sent a verification link to your email address.
verify.body: Click the link in your email to verify your account. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

callback.missingCode: Missing authorization code or verifier. Please sign in again.
callback.invalidState: Invalid state. Possible CSRF — please sign in again.
callback.tokenError: Token exchange failed. Please sign in again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information.
profile.personalInfoDesc: Update your name and display name.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account.
sessions.confirmRevoke: Revoke this session? You will be signed out on that device.
sessions.confirmRevokeAll: This signs you out of every device, including this one. You'll need to sign in again.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Long-lived tokens for programmatic API access.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.confirmRevoke: Revoke this API key? This cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Create API key
dialog.description: Give your key a name and select the permissions it needs.
dialog.name: Key name
dialog.copyWarning: Copy this key now — you won't be able to see it again.
dialog.scopesHint: Pick the permissions this key grants. Less is safer.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your authentication methods and security settings.
security.helpIntro: Turn on two-factor authentication (2FA) to protect your account even if your password leaks.

totp.title: Authenticator app (TOTP)
totp.description: Use a time-based one-time password (TOTP) app for extra login security.
totp.confirmRemove: Remove TOTP authentication? Your account will be less secure.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Biometric or hardware-key login — no password required.

google.title: Google
google.description: Sign in with Google as an alternative login method.
google.confirmUnlink: Unlink your Google account? You will no longer be able to sign in with Google.
google.unlinkNeedsPassword: Set a password before unlinking Google, so you keep a way to sign in.

setup.title: Set up authenticator app
setup.subtitle: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app, then verify with a code.
setup.alreadyDesc: An authenticator app is already set up for your account. Remove it from the security page to set up a new one.
setup.step1Desc: Open your authenticator app and scan the code below.
setup.step2Desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.

backup.title: TOTP activated
backup.description: Save these backup codes somewhere safe. Each can only be used once.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.subtitle: Passwordless login using biometrics or hardware security keys.

oauthClients.title: OAuth Applications
oauthClients.subtitle: Applications that use CTech Account as identity provider.
oauthClients.name: Name
oauthClients.confirmDelete: Delete this application? Every integration using it will stop working immediately.
oauthClients.confirmRegenerate: Generate a new secret? The current secret stops working immediately.

dialog.createDescription: Register an application to authenticate users through CTech Account.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.redirectURIsHint: Space-separated. https required (http only for localhost).
dialog.scopesHint: Pick which data and actions the application may request.
dialog.audienceHint: Resource server identifiers embedded in access tokens.
dialog.clientTypeHint: Confidential: server-side apps with a secret. Public: SPAs/mobile using PKCE only.
dialog.secretWarning: Copy the client secret now — it is shown only once and cannot be recovered.

toast.totpActivated: TOTP activated. Save your backup codes.

consent.title: {{app}} is requesting access
consent.description: The application is asking permission to access the following data on your account:
consent.revocable: You can revoke this access at any time in Account → Connected apps.
consent.error: Could not record your decision. Try again.

connectedApps.title: Connected apps
connectedApps.subtitle: Applications you granted access to your account.
connectedApps.confirmRevoke: Revoke this application's access? It will need your approval again on the next sign-in.

scopeDescriptions.profile: See your name and profile picture

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Recent security events on your account.

stepUp.title: Confirm it’s you
stepUp.description: This action requires recent verification. Enter your authenticator code or use a passkey.
stepUp.enrollDescription: This action requires two-factor authentication, but none is set up on your account yet.
stepUp.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.

identity.title: Identity verification
identity.subtitle: Verify your identity to unlock full access to your account.
identity.notVerifiedCta: Upload your documents and fill in your details to start identity verification.
identity.lockedNote: Identity data is locked after verification.
identity.underage: You must be at least 18 years old.
identity.cpfTaken: This CPF is already registered to another account.
identity.alreadyVerified: You can't change identity data after verification.
identity.invalidData: Check the data and try again.
identity.cpfInvalid: That CPF doesn't look right. Double-check the 11 digits.
identity.submissionLocked: Your verification is already under way. You can't make changes until we finish reviewing it or it expires.
identity.mfaRequired: Identity verification requires two-factor authentication. Set up an authenticator app or a passkey to continue.
identity.finishChecklistNote: Finish the checklist above to enable submit.
identity.zipNotFound: Postal code not found. Fill the address in manually.
identity.awaitingFiles: Upload your ID document and record the four selfie clips below, then submit your details.
identity.underReview: Your documents are queued for review. We will notify you when it is decided.
identity.underReviewNote: We review submissions in the order received and will email you as soon as a decision is made.
identity.rejected: Your verification was rejected. See the details below for what to do next.
identity.rejectionGuidance: Re-upload your ID and re-record all four selfie clips below to resubmit — partial resubmissions aren't accepted.
identity.selfieLeft: Turn your head left, then start recording
identity.selfieRight: Turn your head right, then start recording
identity.selfieHint: A short clip for each direction — this is how we tell a live face from a photo.
identity.selfieConsentTitle: Before we turn on your camera
identity.selfieConsentBody: We'll ask for camera access to record four short clips (look up, down, left, right). This proves you're a real person rather than a printed photo or a looped video. The clips are used only for identity verification and reviewed by our team.
identity.cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Enable it in your browser to record the selfie clips.
identity.cameraBlocked: Your browser is still blocking the camera. Click the camera icon in your address bar (or open your browser's site settings) and allow access, then try again.
identity.cameraNotFound: No camera was found on this device. Connect a camera and try again.
identity.cameraInUse: Your camera is being used by another app or browser tab. Close it and try again.
identity.cameraInsecure: Camera access requires a secure connection. Reload the page over HTTPS and try again.
identity.cameraUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support camera access. Try a different browser to record the selfie clips.
identity.documentPreviewUnavailable: Preview isn't available for this file type, but it will still upload correctly.
identity.documentsPrivacyNote: Your ID photos are used only to verify your identity and are stored securely. They're never shared beyond that.
identity.documentCaptureTips: Make sure all four corners are visible, the photo is in focus, and there's no glare on the document.
identity.detailsPrivacyNote: This information is used only to verify your identity and confirm you meet the age requirement. It's never shared beyond that.
identity.fileTooLarge: The file is too large (maximum 5 MB).
identity.fileTypeUnsupported: Unsupported file type. Use JPG, PNG, HEIC or PDF.
identity.reviewNote: Check everything below before confirming — this can't be changed after submission.
identity.confirmSubmitDescription: Submitting locks your CPF, legal name, birth date, and address — you won't be able to change them until we've made a decision.
